items.name: サクユリ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, place of scenic beauty, or natural monument), classified as flora and fauna (natural monument). It was designated by Aogashima Village on November 12, 2023. Located at Aogashima Village (no lot number), Aogashima Village.

items.name: オオタニワタリ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, place of scenic beauty, or natural monument), classified as flora and fauna (natural monument). It was designated by Aogashima Village on August 30, 2024. Located at Aogashima Village (no lot number), Aogashima Village.

en.name_en: Documents of the Sasaki family, former village headmen (nanushi)
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, classified as old document. It was designated by Aogashima Village on August 30, 2024. Located at Aogashima Village Office, Aogashima Village.
